name: Not Safe for Work
overview: Not Safe for Work is a 2015 British comedy-drama series created and written by D.C. Moore for Channel 4. A group of disillusioned Londoner civil servants are forced to relocate to Northampton after public sector cuts, focusing on their personal and professional struggles as they navigate a new, less glamourous office environment.

trailers.title: TRAILER: Not Safe For Work | Starts Tues 30th June | Channel 4
